# Jamie Oarton — jamieoarton.com

> AI strategy advisor and fractional Chief AI Officer through Bramforth AI, helping UK mid-market businesses build AI strategies that work.

## About Jamie Oarton

Jamie Oarton is an AI strategy advisor, writer, and fractional Chief AI Officer. He is co-founder of Bramforth AI, which provides fractional CAIO services for UK mid-market companies (£20M–£100M revenue). He has experience advising on AI strategy at the highest levels of UK government, military, and diplomatic services, and has delivered AI training to senior British Army officers.

## Topics Covered

- AI strategy for mid-market businesses
- Fractional Chief AI Officer (CAIO) — what it is, who needs one, what it costs
- Shadow AI — unauthorised employee AI use, risks, and governance
- AI governance for UK businesses — policies, regulatory landscape, ICO compliance
- The AI advice gap — C-suite misalignment on AI strategy
- AI ROI — why most AI investments fail and what the successful 10% do differently
